prompt: Some pages in the mushaf view are showing weird box characters instead of Arabic text. It seems random — like page 50 works fine but page 234 shows boxes. The console shows no errors. What's going on and how do I fix it?

assertions.text: Identifies this as a QCF font loading issue (each page has its own font file)
Explains that code_v2 glyphs only render with the matching page-specific QCF font
Mentions the font loading mechanism (ensureQcfFont, document.fonts.load, or @font-face injection)
Suggests concrete debugging steps or fixes (checking network tab, race conditions, timeout fallback)
